Work Plan

Feb 2, 2026

Things to be done

Calculation of CuPc F16CuPc

  1. use X-TDDFT (spin adapted tddft) with BDF to calculate CuPc dimer and F16CuPc using triplet as ground state.
  2. use gaussian to calculate H2Pc cluster model and crystal to model effect of envrioment on peak at 1000 nm.
  3. effect of substibution and effect of morphology

Write F12-DSRG paper

Calculate HF and N2 using relaxed version Calculate Excited State of several molecules : BH ,COH2,H2O,

  1. benchmark s
  2. benchmakr \(\gamma\)
  3. check convergence rate of F12-DSRG-MRPT and DSRG-MRPT

Predicting Molecular orbital from small basis set to larger basis set using diffusion model

  1. predicting hamiltonian using QHNet “Efficient and Equivariant Graph Networks for Predicting Quantum Hamiltonian”

  2. Conditional Generation using diffusion model https://diffusion.csail.mit.edu/2026/index.html
